title: Andaz Tera Mera
overview: Andaaz Tera Mera is a full of fun and comedy movie. The story line is two friends Amar and Prem ,their dream is common and both goal is similar. They want to Marry beautiful and rich girl. One day they both come to know while having tea that richest and beautiful girl is coming from London to do the business in India. They come to conclusion that they will approach the girl and whoever wins the girls heart ,they will marry how they approach her, how they win the girl heart and how they marry her is the story line this
